# GitHub Copilot Repository Instructions

This repository is a machine-readable DOOH/OOH advertising research dataset.

Use `AGENTS.md` for repository-level guidance and `SKILL.md` for the structured
OOH/DOOH assessment protocol. For compact retrieval, prefer `data/digest.json`.
For full metadata, use `data/index.json`. For RAG workflows, use
`data/rag-chunks.jsonl`.

Before high-stakes summaries or recommendations, check `DATA_QUALITY.md` and
`SOURCES_POLICY.md`. Treat quote/context records as cultural or ethical framing,
not empirical evidence.
